case_title: ARSHAD ALI et al RESPONDENT VS. GOODMANSON CONSTRUCTION APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT GOODMANSON CONSTRUCTION AS TO RESPONDENT ALI, ARSHAD ALI, TASLEEM HEARING SET FOR SEP-01-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 807024
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-01-2004 - CONTINUED TO NOV-10-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 525 PER EX PARTE REQUEST/ORDER
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-10-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-10-2004 - JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT OF THIS CASE. DEFENDANT APPELLANT GOODMANSON CONSTRUCTION SHALL PAY TO PLAINTIFFS ARSHAD ALI TASLEEM RAZAK, NISHA RAZAK AND FAIYAZ RAZAK $3000.00 FORTHWITH. SUSAN LEW, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER/ DON FEINBERG, CLERKS; NOT REPORTED. THE APPEAL IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION FOR SETTLEMENT REACHED ABOVE AND IN LIGHT OF THE SETTLEMENT OF THIS ACTION BY ENTRY OF THE ABOVE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT ALI, ARSHAD ALI, TASLEEM RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GOODMANSON CONSTRUCTION $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF ARSHAD ALI, TASLEEM RAZAK, NISHA RAZAK AND FAIYAZ RAZAK FOR $3,000.00 PAYABLE FORTHWITH BY DEFENDANT/APPELLANT GOODMANSON CONSTRUCTION. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
